sevenDay.synopsis: That pesky boundary has stalled out, and showers are slowly streaming across the LFA. There's a mix of cigs right now, but I suspect we'll see widespread MVFR cigs soon with some patchy IFR around those heavier showers. This will be the case thru the PM period, too. Given the rain today, the N1 could be IFR by 22L. Tomorrow is another story. In fact, the rest of the week is looking good with VFR and NEG hazards expected.
sevenDay.title: 7-DAY OUTLOOK: 12 MAY - 18 MAY
